summary: Hydrated preflight shows no security-sensitive refs and current main at 8f50920c4565017679f99d6a7e0a2ebbd2021eb9. No GitHub mutations are planned. #55978 remains the narrow canonical path for the cron sticky-offset subfamily, but #47582 is a conflicting normal-flow Cron editor direction that needs maintainer choice before either PR is superseded or closed. Other open refs are separate UI/CSS subclusters or issue-to-PR pairs, and live-closed candidate refs are skipped.
